---
title: "Esta es una prueba"
description: "An interactive Shiny/Observable dashboard."
date: 2026-05-01
image: ../files/img/projects/dashboard-thumb.png
categories: [R, Shiny, data-viz]
format:
  html:
    toc: true
---

## Overview

Short description of the problem this project solves and who it is for.

<!--

## What it does

- Pulls data from `X` API / source
- Cleans and harmonises series across regions
- Serves an interactive dashboard for exploring trends

## Links

\<!-- - [{{< fa display >}} Live app](https://username.shinyapps.io/labor-dashboard/) - [{{< fa brands github >}} Source code](https://github.com/username/labor-dashboard)

## Screenshot

![](../files/img/projects/dashboard-thumb.png)
